queries.question: What trail IDs and difficulties are common for all national parks?
queries.sql: SELECT Trails.trail_id, Trails.difficulty  from National_Parks_Trails join Trails on National_Parks_Trails.trail_id = Trails.trail_id join National_Parks on National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id = National_Parks.park_id   GROUP BY National_Parks_Trails.trail_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  National_Parks)

queries.question: For every national park, what are the corresponding trail IDs and difficulties?
queries.sql: select national_parks.name , trails.trail_id , trails.difficulty from National_Parks_Trails join Trails on National_Parks_Trails.trail_id = Trails.trail_id join National_Parks on National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id = National_Parks.park_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?trail_id ?difficulty WHERE {
  ?national_parks_trails a :National_Parks_Trails .
  ?trails a :Trails .
  ?national_parks_trails p:hasTrails ?trails .
  ?national_parks a :National_Parks .
  ?national_parks_trails p:hasNational_Parks ?national_parks .
  ?national_parks p:name ?name .
  ?trails p:trail_id ?trail_id .
  ?trails p:difficulty ?difficulty .
}

queries.question: What are the difficulties of the trails that are common to all national parks?
queries.sql: SELECT Trails.difficulty  from National_Parks_Trails join Trails on National_Parks_Trails.trail_id = Trails.trail_id join National_Parks on National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id = National_Parks.park_id   GROUP BY National_Parks_Trails.trail_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  National_Parks)

queries.question: What is the difficulty of the trail that is offered in each national park?
queries.sql: select national_parks.name , trails.difficulty from National_Parks_Trails join Trails on National_Parks_Trails.trail_id = Trails.trail_id join National_Parks on National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id = National_Parks.park_id

queries.question: Show the difficulty and length of trials that are shared by all national parks.
queries.sql: SELECT Trails.difficulty, Trails.length  from National_Parks_Trails join Trails on National_Parks_Trails.trail_id = Trails.trail_id join National_Parks on National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id = National_Parks.park_id   GROUP BY National_Parks_Trails.trail_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  National_Parks)

queries.question: For every national park, what is the related length of trail?
queries.sql: select national_parks.name , trails.length from National_Parks_Trails join Trails on National_Parks_Trails.trail_id = Trails.trail_id join National_Parks on National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id = National_Parks.park_id

queries.question: What are the IDs, difficulties and lengths of the trails common to all national parks.
queries.sql: SELECT Trails.trail_id, Trails.difficulty, Trails.length  from National_Parks_Trails join Trails on National_Parks_Trails.trail_id = Trails.trail_id join National_Parks on National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id = National_Parks.park_id   GROUP BY National_Parks_Trails.trail_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  National_Parks)

queries.question: Show me the IDs, difficulties and lengths of the trails every national park has.
queries.sql: select national_parks.name , trails.trail_id , trails.difficulty , trails.length from National_Parks_Trails join Trails on National_Parks_Trails.trail_id = Trails.trail_id join National_Parks on National_Parks_Trails.national_park_id = National_Parks.park_id
